entry.title: RES26-161 (Honolulu): INTRO → EES
entry.content:
REQUESTING THE CITY ADMINISTRATION TO DEVELOP MINIMUM STANDARDS FOR ALL RESILIENCE HUBS CONSTRUCTED OR RETROFITTED USING THE FUNDS APPROPRIATED IN THE FISCAL YEAR 2027 EXECUTIVE CAPITAL BUDGET.

Status: INTRO → EES

Latest action: Postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-161 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
REQUESTING THE CITY ADMINISTRATION TO DEVELOP MINIMUM STANDARDS FOR ALL RESILIENCE HUBS CONSTRUCTED OR RETROFITTED USING THE FUNDS APPROPRIATED IN THE FISCAL YEAR 2027 EXECUTIVE CAPITAL BUDGET.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site
